Equity Research Analyst Note

Subject: Preview of Forthcoming Earnings – Quantum Dynamics Ltd.

Dear Investors,

Quantum Dynamics Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456A) is set to release its Q3 earnings on November 15, 2023. We anticipate a strong performance based on preliminary indicators. Dr. Alice Tan, our lead analyst, predicts revenue growth of approximately 12% year-over-year. For any inquiries, please contact our office at +65 6123 4567 or email alice.tan@quantumresearch.sg.

It is important to note that the project status is not aligned with the initial project plan due to unforeseen market conditions, which may slightly impact the expected profit margins.

Please visit https://quantumdynamics.sg/investor/S9876543B for secure access to detailed financial models and projections. The SPA (Share Purchase Agreement) associated with the recent acquisition outlines a total investment of SGD 50 million. References to this SPA should be considered for strategic alignment.

Mr. John Lim, CEO of Quantum Dynamics, will host a conference call post-announcement to discuss the results and future outlook. Dial in details will be shared closer to the date.

Regards,
Equity Research Team
Quantum Dynamics Ltd.
